duplicate_pairs.description: Same birth_name with birth year within ±2y. Likely double-entries from Wikidata vs Wikipedia VN import. Manual review before enrichment.

garbage_names.description: Q-only ('Q12345'), year-only ('1949'), or too-short names. These are filtered at display time but still occupy enrichment slots.

nameless_no_source.description: NULL birth_name AND no Wikipedia URL. LLM has nothing to ground on — DO NOT enrich these.

parent_child_age_gap.description: Parent < 12y or > 60y older than child. Either wrong birth year or wrong relation.

likely_dead_no_death_year.description: Born before 1916 but no death_date_y. Almost certainly missing data, not still alive.

isolated_nodes.description: No relations on either side. Enriching adds bio but does NOT improve path-finding or tree exploration.

era_birth_mismatch.description: Era bucket disagrees with birth_date_y. Cheap to repair, hurts display credibility.

self_relations.description: X is related to X. Always wrong.

year_only_name.description: Name is a 4-digit year like '1949'. Subset of garbage_names but called out separately for tracking the year-import regression.
